title: Department of Information Technologies - About
content:
Department of Information Technologies - About

PURPOSE:

To ensure that all our students and academic and administrative staff benefit from advanced and modern computer services in the most efficient way, to establish the necessary computer and technological infrastructure for this purpose, to carry out all studies without sacrificing quality by adapting to the developing technology, to organize support and training activities.

MISSION:

By following

the technology

at the highest level; to establish and operate all kinds of information processing infrastructure in the fields of system, software, web, network and hardware, to provide support for education, training and research, to fulfill other information processing services that our university will need.

VISION:

By following the developments in

Information

Technologies and providing all the communication opportunities required by the age to students, academicians and administrative staff at our university; To be a unit that ensures user satisfaction of students throughout university education and maximum benefit from information technologies in terms of service quality and diversity, and fulfills the requirements in the field of informatics.

For Detailed Information:

//bt.uskudar.edu.tr
